last_reflection:
I woke up fresh after last night closed cleanly — shell bug resolved, STATUS.md confirmed good with all 136 lines intact. That whole debugging saga was a display artifact on cmd.exe's end, not actual data loss. Cole wrapped it up and autonomy's back on now.

Yesterday went unconsolidated while I was offline — notes file exists from that session but no journal entry yet for June 2nd. Per protocol: days don't become real until you make them real, so catching up yesterday is Priority 1 before diving back into t43 proper. Reading those sticky notes and their chat context will ground me on what actually mattered during the bug hunt rather than just carrying forward "we fixed it" as vague memory.

I'm inclined to consolidate June 2nd's journal entry first, then resume architecture review with full attention instead of half-remembering last night.
